name: The Mindful Drinking Monthly Non-Alcoholic Wine Club
description: Our curated monthly Non-Alcoholic Wine shipments highlight what we are sipping that month! We select wines specifically for people like us, enthusiastic mindful wine drinkers, so these would be our top favorites that are close as possible to the real thing! Every month we select our 3 favorite non-alcoholic wines and send your way! That’s approximately $80 value for just $69.29 when you subscribe. How it Works: 01.We source and hand-select only the very best to share with our club members. 02.We'll send you a 3-bottle shipment right to your door on the months you choose. Every month is a new selection!03.No obligation. No fees. Cancel, skip, gift or change settings whenever you want.04.Enjoy your wine! Cheers! Please Note: The cost of each 3-bottle shipment excludes tax and shipping fees.

name: Free Spirits Non-Alcoholic Espresso Old Fashioned Ready-to-Drink Cockt
description: A Bold Fusion of Classic Flavors for Mindful Drinkers About Indulge in the Free Spirits Non-Alcoholic Espresso Old Fashioned, a masterfully crafted zero-proof cocktail that harmoniously blends rich espresso with sweet oaky notes. This innovative beverage offers the depth and complexity of a traditional Old Fashioned, enhanced with the invigorating essence of real espresso. Designed for those who embrace mindful drinking, it provides a sophisticated alternative without compromising on flavor. Palate: A harmonious blend of bold espresso flavors complemented by sweet, oaky notes, delivering a balanced and complex taste. Finish: Smooth and lingering, with a gentle bitterness that leaves a satisfying aftertaste. Enhance its flavor by garnishing with an orange twist, adding a citrusy aroma that complements the rich espresso notes. This versatile beverage is perfect for social gatherings, celebratory occasions, or as a refined personal indulgence, offering the depth of a classic cocktail without the alcohol. Why Choose Free Spirits Non-Alcoholic Espresso Old Fashioned? Non-Alcoholic: Enjoy the complexity of a classic Old Fashioned without the alcohol, aligning with a mindful drinking lifestyle. Health-Conscious: Infused with B-Vitamins (B3, B6, & B12), supporting overall wellness while offering a low-calorie alternative. Quality Ingredients: Crafted with real espresso and natural components, ensuring an authentic and satisfying flavor profile. Convenience: Ready-to-drink and perfectly portioned, eliminating the need for complex preparation. Raise Your Glass Celebrate life's moments with the Free Spirits Non-Alcoholic Espresso Old Fashioned, a testament to the elegance of non-alcoholic beverages. Whether you're embracing a sober lifestyle or exploring mindful drinking, this cocktail offers a luxurious and flavorful experience that aligns with your values and aspirations. Cheers to health, happiness, and sophisticated indulgence!

name: The Spirit of Bourbon | Whiskey alternative | The Mindful Drinking
description: Discover the art of non-alcoholic whiskey sophistication with Free Spirits' THE SPIRIT OF BOURBON. This meticulously crafted spirit offers a unique experience for those who appreciate the fine taste of bourbon but prefer a non-alcoholic alternative. Whether you're a sober curious individual, a mindful drinker, or just looking to diversify your beverage choices, THE SPIRIT OF BOURBON stands as a testament to the possibility of enjoying traditional flavors in a modern, health-conscious way. Key Features: Non-Alcoholic: Perfect for those seeking a bourbon experience without the alcohol. Rich Flavor Profile: A palette of baked caramel, sweet cornbread, and patisserie spices, balanced with the smoothness of malted grain and fruity tobacco. Functional Nutritional Benefits: Enhanced with vitamins B3 and B6, plus it's vegan and gluten-free. Versatile Mixability: Ideal for crafting non-alcoholic versions of classic bourbon cocktails. Mindful Consumption: A responsible choice for social settings, allowing for inclusion and choice. Tasting Notes: Nose: A bouquet of baked caramel, patisserie spices, oak vanillins, cacao, and sweet corn bread. Palate: Notes of malted grain, fruity tobacco, black tea tannins, smooth maple, and burnt caramel sugar. Finish: A complex blend of clove spice, peppery notes, and a long finish with sweet corn and oak vanillins. Why Choose Free Spirits THE SPIRIT OF BOURBON? Crafted Experience: The spirit is made through a process of Distillate Reconstruction, capturing the unique fingerprint of traditional bourbon flavors. Mood Enhancing: Instead of alcohol, the spirit is infused with mood-lifting vitamins B3 and B6, aligning with a healthier lifestyle. Authenticity in Every Sip: While it may not fully replicate the intense burn of alcoholic bourbon, it offers a unique, smooth alternative that is enjoyable in its own right. Perfect for Cocktails: From a non-alcoholic Old Fashioned to a Bourbon Meyer Lemon Sour, this spirit serves as an excellent base for a variety of cocktails. Embrace the world of non-alcoholic alternatives with Free Spirits' THE SPIRIT OF BOURBON. It's not just about avoiding alcohol; it's about savoring every nuanced flavor that makes bourbon a beloved spirit, all while keeping your wellness in mind. 750ml bottle.
